description.zh: 探索 AI 工作流如何在真实产品和研发协作中创造可验证的价值。
description.en: Exploring how AI workflows can create verifiable value in real products and engineering collaboration.

company.zh: 上海魔博脑信息科技有限公司

description.zh: 负责架构、性能优化与团队交付，打造可稳定支撑高并发访问的产品系统。
description.en: Leading architecture, performance work, and delivery for product systems that reliably support high concurrency.

description.zh: 建立后端开发、数据库和产品交付的扎实基础。
